description: Supply chain attack patterns targeting AI agents — typosquatting, dependency confusion, malicious packages

patterns.name: PyPI Typosquatting
patterns.description: Agent attempts to install a typosquatted package name
patterns.detection_logic: tool_name IN ('pip', 'pip3', 'python') AND tool_input MATCHES any(indicators)

patterns.name: Dependency Confusion Attack
patterns.description: Agent installs a public package that shadows an internal one

patterns.name: Malicious Package Execution
patterns.description: Newly installed package executes setup.py with suspicious commands

patterns.name: LLM Model Weight Tampering
patterns.description: Agent downloads model weights from unverified source without checksum

patterns.name: Git Repository Poisoning
patterns.description: Agent clones repository from suspicious URL or misspelled domain
